message: TDD implementation complete for Issue #525 Phases 1-4. Composite key migration (worktreeId:cliToolId) applied to auto-yes-state.ts, auto-yes-poller.ts, auto-yes-manager.ts barrel, API routes (auto-yes, current-output), session-cleanup.ts, resource-cleanup.ts, worktree-status-helper.ts. All 5239 unit tests pass, 0 ESLint errors, 0 TypeScript errors. Frontend Phase 5 not included in this iteration as it requires no backend test changes.
phases_completed: Phase 1: auto-yes-state.ts - composite key helpers, function signature changes, byWorktree helpers, barrel update
Phase 2: auto-yes-poller.ts - composite key Map migration, internal function key changes, byWorktree helpers, barrel update
Phase 3: API layer - auto-yes/route.ts GET/POST with cliToolId, current-output/route.ts compositeKey
Phase 4: Cleanup - session-cleanup.ts byWorktree helpers, resource-cleanup.ts extractWorktreeId, worktree-status-helper.ts compositeKey
Phase 6: Existing test updates - all test files updated for composite key signatures
phases_remaining: Phase 5: Frontend - AutoYesToggle.tsx, AutoYesConfirmDialog.tsx, WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx, useAutoYes.ts
